title: PeerShelf
summary: PeerShelf is an academic collaboration platform designed to help students discover, share, and access educational resources.
shortDescription: An academic collaboration platform focused on knowledge sharing and accessible learning.

overview: PeerShelf is an academic collaboration platform designed to help students discover, share, and access educational resources.
The product explores how learning resources can become easier to organize and access through a shared academic experience.
challenges: The product needed to make student collaboration and resource sharing feel simple.
The experience needed to support discovery, access, and educational usefulness.
approach: Worked across product strategy, user experience, and frontend development.
Focused the interface around resource sharing and academic collaboration.
Used reusable UI patterns to support a scalable product experience.
outcome: PeerShelf is an academic collaboration platform focused on knowledge sharing and accessible learning.
caseStudy.pullQuote: The product asks how students can discover useful academic resources faster.

seo.title: PeerShelf | Cornerstone Ephraim
seo.description: An academic collaboration platform focused on knowledge sharing and accessible learning.
